Home / Services / Home Renovations & Remodels

Home Renovations & Remodels

Transform your living space with expert renovation and remodeling services.

Ready to breathe new life into your home? Triple Digit Wood Design provides comprehensive home renovation and remodeling services tailored to your vision and budget. We understand the unique challenges of working on existing homes in the Mesa area, from outdated layouts to aging infrastructure.

Whether you're looking to remodel your kitchen, bathroom, or entire home, we have the expertise to bring your ideas to life. We handle all aspects of the project, from initial design and permitting to demolition, construction, and finishing. Our team of skilled craftsmen is dedicated to delivering exceptional quality and attention to detail.

We work closely with you throughout the entire process, ensuring that your vision is realized and that the project is completed on time and within budget. Let us help you transform your house into the home of your dreams with our expert renovation and remodeling services.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Consultation - Discuss your goals, budget, and timeline.
  2. 02 Step 2: Design & Planning - Develop detailed plans and obtain necessary permits.
  3. 03 Step 3: Demolition - Safely remove existing structures and materials.
  4. 04 Step 4: Construction - Build your new space with precision and care.
  5. 05 Step 5: Finishing - Add finishing touches, such as painting, flooring, and fixtures.

Benefits

  • Increased home value
  • Improved functionality
  • Enhanced aesthetics
  • Personalized living space

Frequently Asked Questions

What types of home renovations and remodels do you offer?

We offer a wide range of home renovation and remodeling services, including kitchen remodels, bathroom remodels, basement finishing, room additions, and whole-house renovations.

How long does a home renovation or remodel take?

The timeline varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. However, most home renovations and remodels can be completed within 4-12 weeks.

Do you offer financing options for home renovations and remodels?

Yes, we offer flexible financing options to help make your dream renovation a reality. Contact us to learn more about our financing plans.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with home renovations & remodels? Contact us today.
